'''nodhavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbishing|rubbishing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbishing|rubbishing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nodhavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhavithi|nodhavithi]] || [[word:nodhaviji|nodhaviji]] || [[word:nodhavishi|nodhavishi]] || [[word:nodhaviki|nodhaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhavuthuthu|nodhavuthuthu]] || [[word:nodhavujuju|nodhavujuju]] || [[word:nodhavushushu|nodhavushushu]] || [[word:nodhavukuku|nodhavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhavuthu|nodhavuthu]] || [[word:nodhavuju|nodhavuju]] || [[word:nodhavushu|nodhavushu]] || [[word:nodhavuku|nodhavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhavufthuf|nodhavufthuf]] || [[word:nodhavufjuf|nodhavufjuf]] || [[word:nodhavufshuf|nodhavufshuf]] || [[word:nodhavufkuf|nodhavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhavethe|nodhavethe]] || [[word:nodhaveje|nodhaveje]] || [[word:nodhaveshe|nodhaveshe]] || [[word:nodhaveke|nodhaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhavothotho|nodhavothotho]] || [[word:nodhavojojo|nodhavojojo]] || [[word:nodhavoshosho|nodhavoshosho]] || [[word:nodhavokoko|nodhavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhavotho|nodhavotho]] || [[word:nodhavojo|nodhavojo]] || [[word:nodhavosho|nodhavosho]] || [[word:nodhavoko|nodhavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhavofthof|nodhavofthof]] || [[word:nodhavofjof|nodhavofjof]] || [[word:nodhavofshof|nodhavofshof]] || [[word:nodhavofkof|nodhavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfthĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfjĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfshĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nodhavĂŻfkĂŻf|nodhavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nodhavĂŠthĂŠ|nodhavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nodhavĂŠjĂŠ|nodhavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nodhavĂŠshĂŠ|nodhavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nodhavĂŠkĂŠ|nodhavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nodhavathatha|nodhavathatha]] || [[word:nodhavajaja|nodhavajaja]] || [[word:nodhavashasha|nodhavashasha]] || [[word:nodhavakaka|nodhavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nodhavatha|nodhavatha]] || [[word:nodhavaja|nodhavaja]] || [[word:nodhavasha|nodhavasha]] || [[word:nodhavaka|nodhavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nodhavafthaf|nodhavafthaf]] || [[word:nodhavafjaf|nodhavafjaf]] || [[word:nodhavafshaf|nodhavafshaf]] || [[word:nodhavafkaf|nodhavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nodhavasha|nodhavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodhavshĂ«asha|nodhavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodhavroasha|nodhavroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodhavmuasha|nodhavmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodhavyaasha|nodhavyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodhavnkshĂ«asha|gonodhavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodhavnkroasha|gonodhavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodhavnkmuasha|gonodhavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodhavnkyaasha|gonodhavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nodhadhavasha|nodhadhavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodhadhavshĂ«asha|nodhadhavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodhadhavroasha|nodhadhavroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodhadhavmuasha|nodhadhavmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodhadhavyaasha|nodhadhavyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodhadhavnkshĂ«asha|gonodhadhavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodhadhavnkroasha|gonodhadhavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodhadhavnkmuasha|gonodhadhavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodhadhavnkyaasha|gonodhadhavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nedhĂŠvasha|nedhĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nedhĂŠvshĂ«asha|nedhĂŠvshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nedhĂŠvroasha|nedhĂŠvroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nedhĂŠvmuasha|nedhĂŠvmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nedhĂŠvyaasha|nedhĂŠvyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠvnkshĂ«asha|gonedhĂŠvnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠvnkroasha|gonedhĂŠvnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠvnkmuasha|gonedhĂŠvnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonedhĂŠvnkyaasha|gonedhĂŠvnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nodhfavasha|nodhfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nodhfavshĂ«asha|nodhfavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nodhfavroasha|nodhfavroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nodhfavmuasha|nodhfavmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nodhfavyaasha|nodhfavyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonodhfavnkshĂ«asha|gonodhfavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonodhfavnkroasha|gonodhfavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonodhfavnkmuasha|gonodhfavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonodhfavnkyaasha|gonodhfavnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
